title: Flourpot Pickle Delight
description: A crowd-pleasing German dish featuring bitter, crunchy floury potatoes with a touch of pickle to enhance the flavor and texture.
instructions: Peel the potatoes and slice them into thin rounds.
Mix the flour, lemon juice, salt, garlic, apple cider vinegar, water, and pickling salt in a large bowl. Add the potato slices to the mixture and toss gently until they are coated evenly.
Transfer the coated potatoes to a microwave-safe dish or a pot that can be sealed tightly with plastic wrap or a lid.
Microwave on high for 5-7 minutes, turning halfway through cooking time. Alternatively, you can use a pressure cooker set to low pressure for about 10 minutes.
Let it cool slightly before serving.
